claim_boundary: diagnostic-only; not benchmark rates, planner comparisons, paper-facing mechanism frequencies, or safety evidence

denominator_definition: Each aggregate row reports trace_denominator for the scenario_family/planner_id/seed group. In this bundle, observed predicate rows come from crossing_proxy/orca/111 with denominator 1; the two #2428 traces are included in input_trace_count but produced no predicate rows.
interpretation: The table validates the denominator-aware aggregation and fail-closed not_available row on versioned inputs. It does not move a benchmark claim because the bundle is not a predeclared benchmark matrix.
